title: CRISIS HOTLINE AND INTERVENTION - 211info
text: WALLOWA VALLEY CENTER FOR WELLNESS CRISIS HOTLINE AND INTERVENTION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF 24-hour crisis line offers a range of crisis services and interventions including crisis screening, pre-commitment evaluations, alternatives to hospitalization, short-term therapeutic interventions, and crisis stabilization. 606 Medical Parkway Enterprise, OR 97828 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week (541) 398-1175 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Crisis Line (541) 398-1175 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for crisis services FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Wallowa County SITE HOURS: By appointment only Services: General Crisis Intervention Hotlines Mental Health Crisis Lines Suicide Prevention Hotlines Other Services Offered At This Location: MENTAL HEALTH CARE FACILITIES - MENTAL HEALTH AND COUNSELING SERVICES MENTAL HEALTH CARE FACILITIES - RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT MENTAL HEALTH SUPPORT SERVICES - EARLY ASSESSMENT AND SUPPORT ALLIANCE REHABILITATION/HABILITATION SERVICES - ASSERTIVE COMMUNITY TREATMENT REHABILITATION/HABILITATION SERVICES - COMMUNITY DEVELOPMENTAL DISABILITIES PROGRAM SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - OUTPATIENT ALCOHOL, DRUG, GAMBLING TREATMENT SERVICES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. WALLOWA VALLEY CENTER FOR WELLNESS
